title: Centered Bows
description: Moves bows to the center of the screen.
body:
This mod simply moves bows to **_center_** to the screen, similar to older fps games like **Quake**!

This should also work with any bow retextures so long as it doesn't affect the model itself.


If you want a similar pack that changes the crossbow, I recommend this pack (Not made by me.)
([https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bow-and-crossbow-visual-changes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bow-and-crossbow-visual-changes))
